subject: Re: Concert Tickets
body:
thanks ,,also wire simona 6000 euros

----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Saturday, February 10, 2007 12:36:09 PM
Subject: Concert Tickets



 

Hellooooooo.  I 
called Premier Tickets at 10:00 this morning...they unfortunately will not know 
until Monday about tickets for Wednesday.  Apparently the producer has 
not released the house tickets yet to their contact.  He said there is 
a 90% chance we will get the tickets we want.  They are $250 a piece and I 
have given his your credit card details already.  I will follow up on 
MOnday.  Have a tremendous weekend!

 

Les

 

 

 

 

 

 

Lesley Groff

Executive Assistant to Jeffrey 
Epstein
